diagnosis: Big J Exterior Restorations already has a website, but it likely undersells the real business. The redesign opportunity is to improve clarity, trust, and the path from interest to booking or enquiry. Make the current site feel more credible than the existing version. Clarify the next step so mobile visitors can act faster. The biggest revenue leak is usually weak quote intent and unclear trust on mobile.
siteBrief: Big J Exterior Restorations is a roof restoration in Brisbane. Lead with Big J Exterior Restorations already has real-world traction; the website should finally feel as strong as the service. Highlight roof restoration, leak repairs, roof painting. Keep the tone confident, practical, conversion-focused. The main CTA should be Call now. One design choice that should stand out is high-contrast CTA.
coldMessage: Hey Big, I looked at Big J Exterior Restorations in Brisbane. Uses a Gmail address and presents roof restoration alongside painting and pressure washing. I took a look at the current site and mocked up a version that makes the offer clearer and the next step easier for mobile visitors. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is hero clarity. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing CTA path. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
subjectLines: Built something for Big J Exterior Restorations
Quick mockup for Big J Exterior Restorations
Saw your listing and made this for Big J Exterior Restorations
proofPoints: Service-area and quote path can be made clearer on mobile
